zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline Riddlesford於大約1223年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster44歲，母親Annora de Vitre34歲。她於1243年2月8日與Stephen de Longespée在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年7月19日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾塞頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emmeline Riddlesford于大约1223年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster44岁，母亲Annora de Vitre34岁。她于1243年2月8日与Stephen de Longespée在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年7月19日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾塞頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline Riddlesford was born about 1223, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster, was 44 and her mother, Annora de Vitre, was 34. She married Stephen de Longespée on 8 February 1243, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 19 July 1276, in Sutton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline Riddlesford est née environ 1223, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Annora de Vitre, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen de Longespée le 8 février 1243, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1276, à Sutton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline Riddlesford um 1223 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster 44 und ihre Mutter Annora de Vitre 34. Sie hat am 8. Februar 1243 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Stephen de Longespée geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1276 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Sutton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline Riddlesford è nata il circa 1223 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Annora de Vitre, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Stephen de Longespée il 8 febbraio 1243, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1276, nel Sutton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline Riddlesfordが約1223年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinsterは44歳，母Annora de Vitreは34歳であった。1243年2月8日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでStephen de Longespéeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年7月19日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスットオンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline Riddlesford(이)가 대략 1223년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annora de Vitre(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1243년 2월 8일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Stephen de Longespée(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 수턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline Riddlesford nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Annora de Vitre, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen de Longespée em 8 de fevereiro de 1243, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1276, em Sutton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline Riddlesford родилась около 1223 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Annora de Vitre, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen de Longespée 8 февраля 1243 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 июля 1276 г. в местности суттон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emmeline Riddlesford nació aproximadamente 1223, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Riddlesford Chief Baron of Leinster, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Annora de Vitre, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Stephen de Longespée el 8 de febrero de 1243, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de julio de 1276, en Sutton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
